text: We explored the structural aspects of matter transport in DES–water mixtures by performing diffusion experiments. The results show that DES–water mixtures are rarely considered as homogeneous solutions. The experiments revealed a very non-linear behaviour of the transporting species (cation, hydrogen bond donor and water) depending on the concentration considered, suggesting a very non uniform structure along the whole composition range.
